message.content:
(1) Blog section visible.  
(2) N/A (not testimonials).  
(3) Post cards in a **3-column grid** (responsive). Each card includes: a full-width hero image, a title, a descriptive subtitle, read time, date, and a "Read article" button with an arrow icon.  
(4) Notable design patterns: Dark theme with high-contrast text, consistent spacing, and a "READ MORE POSTS" button with an arrow for pagination.
